name: Olives Royale
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the water chestnuts into thin slivers.
2. Cut each slice of bacon in half.
3. Wrap a piece of bacon around a black olive, securing it with a wooden pick.
4. Place the wrapped olives on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
5. Broil for 1-2 minutes at a distance of 3-4 inches from the heat source, until the bacon is crisp and golden brown.
6. Serve warm.
